title: Renewed education inspection framework: supporting evidence base
body: "These references relate to the development of the following inspection guidance:    Early years inspection: toolkit, operating guide and information   State-funded school inspection: toolkit, operating guide and information   Non-association independent school inspection: toolkit, operating guide and information   Further education and skills inspection: toolkit, operating guide and information   Initial teacher education inspection: toolkit, operating guide, information and framework    Our renewed education inspection framework is for use from 10 November 2025. "

taxons.title: Inspections and performance of education providers
